plan_type_rationale: 47 files across >1 top-level module directory. Strict gates after every phase enforce tsc + vitest before proceeding.
objective: Replace all console.log, console.error, and console.warn calls in non-CLI src/ files with structured logger calls from src/utils/logger.ts. Baseline: 560 total calls (198 non-CLI). Target: 0 non-CLI console calls. CLI files (362 calls) are out of scope.
acceptance_criteria: npx tsc --noEmit exits 0 after every phase
vitest passes (all tests) after every phase
Every migrated file imports logger from the correct relative path to src/utils/logger.ts

phases.name: High-density scanner + pipeline files
phases.description: Migrate the 3 highest-count non-CLI files: scanner.ts (41), orchestrator.ts (21), error-reporter.ts (14). Total: 76 calls.

tasks.description: Read src/utils/logger.ts to confirm API surface: info(), warn(), error(), debug(). Note singleton export pattern.
Read src/scanner/scanner.ts fully. Categorize each console call: error → logger.error, warn → logger.warn, diagnostic debug → logger.debug, progress/status → logger.info.
Add 'import logger from "../utils/logger";' to src/scanner/scanner.ts. Replace all 41 console calls with logger equivalents per categorization.
Read src/pipeline/orchestrator.ts fully. Categorize each of the 21 console calls.
Add logger import to src/pipeline/orchestrator.ts (path: '../../utils/logger' from src/pipeline/). Replace all 21 console calls.
Read src/scanner/error-reporter.ts fully. Categorize each of the 14 console calls.
Add logger import to src/scanner/error-reporter.ts. Replace all 14 console calls.
npx tsc --noEmit — must exit 0. Fix any import-path errors before continuing.
npx vitest run — must pass all tests.
Verify: grep -r 'console\.log\|console\.error\|console\.warn' src/scanner/scanner.ts src/pipeline/orchestrator.ts src/scanner/error-reporter.ts | wc -l must equal 0.
git commit: 'refactor(logging): migrate scanner.ts, orchestrator.ts, error-reporter.ts to logger'
Phase 1 hard stop. Confirm: tsc clean, vitest pass, 76 console calls eliminated. Proceed to Phase 2.

phases.name: Medium-density plugin, cache, adapter, semantic files
phases.description: Migrate 8 files: local-loader.ts (11), npm-loader.ts (10), semantic/orchestrator.ts (7), pipeline/incremental-cache.ts (7), cache/incremental-cache.ts (7), adapter/graph-to-elements.ts (7), plugin-scanner.ts (6), plugin-graph.ts (6). Total: 61 calls.

tasks.description: Read each of the 8 files in turn. Note import depth relative to src/utils/logger.ts for each.
Migrate src/plugins/loaders/local-loader.ts (11 calls). Import path: '../../../utils/logger'.
Migrate src/plugins/loaders/npm-loader.ts (10 calls). Import path: '../../../utils/logger'.
Migrate src/semantic/orchestrator.ts (7 calls). Import path: '../../utils/logger'.
Migrate src/pipeline/incremental-cache.ts (7 calls). Import path: '../../utils/logger'.
Migrate src/cache/incremental-cache.ts (7 calls). Import path: '../../utils/logger'.
Migrate src/adapter/graph-to-elements.ts (7 calls). Import path: '../../utils/logger'.
Migrate src/plugins/plugin-scanner.ts (6 calls). Import path: '../../utils/logger'.
Migrate src/plugins/plugin-graph.ts (6 calls). Import path: '../../utils/logger'.
npx tsc --noEmit — exit 0 required.
npx vitest run — all tests pass.
Spot-check: grep console Phase 2 files, count must equal 0.
git commit: 'refactor(logging): migrate plugins, cache, adapter, semantic files to logger'
Phase 2 hard stop. 137 of 198 non-CLI console calls eliminated. Proceed to Phase 3.

phases.name: Mid-tier files (3–4 calls each)
phases.description: Migrate 8 files: pipeline/grammar-registry.ts (4), integration/vector/vector-store.ts (4), context/breaking-change-detector/diff-analyzer.ts (4), semantic/llm-enricher.ts (3), scanner/file-watcher.ts (3), index.ts (3), fileGeneration/saveFrontendCalls.ts (3). Total: 24 calls.

tasks.description: Read each file in turn. Note depth for import path calculation.
Migrate src/pipeline/grammar-registry.ts (4 calls). Import: '../../utils/logger'.
Migrate src/integration/vector/vector-store.ts (4 calls). Import: '../../utils/logger'.
Migrate src/context/breaking-change-detector/diff-analyzer.ts (4 calls). Import: '../../../utils/logger'.
Migrate src/semantic/llm-enricher.ts (3 calls). Import: '../../utils/logger'.
Migrate src/scanner/file-watcher.ts (3 calls). Import: '../../utils/logger'.
Migrate src/index.ts (3 calls). Import: './utils/logger'.
Migrate src/fileGeneration/saveFrontendCalls.ts (3 calls). Import: '../../utils/logger'.
npx tsc --noEmit — exit 0.
npx vitest run — all tests pass.
git commit: 'refactor(logging): migrate mid-tier files to logger (grammar-registry, vector-store, diff-analyzer, llm-enricher, file-watcher, index, saveFrontendCalls)'
Phase 3 hard stop. 161 of 198 non-CLI calls eliminated. Proceed to Phase 4.

phases.name: Long-tail sweep (1–2 calls each)
phases.description: Migrate remaining 36 files with 1–2 console calls each. Total: 37 calls. Final verification that non-CLI count reaches 0.

tasks.description: Read each of the 36 long-tail files. Group by directory to batch import-path computation.
Migrate src/validator/ files (migration-mapper.ts 2, route-validator.ts 1). Import: '../../utils/logger'.
Migrate src/semantic/ remaining files (registry-sync.ts 2, header-generator.ts 2, ast-extractor.ts 2). Import: '../../utils/logger'.
Migrate src/scanner/ remaining files (tree-sitter-scanner.ts 2, frontend-scanner.ts 1). Import: '../../utils/logger'.

Migrate src/pipeline/generators/ files (registry-generator.ts 2, validation-generator.ts 1, pattern-generator.ts 1, index-generator.ts 1, health-generator.ts 1, graph-generator.ts 1, export-generator.ts 1, drift-generator.ts 1, diagram-generator.ts 1, coverage-generator.ts 1, context-generator.ts 1, complexity-generator.ts 1). Import: '../../../utils/logger'.
Migrate src/pipeline/extractors/ files (relationship-extractor.ts 2, element-extractor.ts 1). Import: '../../../utils/logger'.

Migrate remaining isolated files: config/presets.ts (2, '../utils/logger'), integration/llm/llm-provider.ts (1, '../../utils/logger'), indexer/index-store.ts (1, '../../utils/logger'), context/context-generator.ts (1, '../../utils/logger'), analyzer/dependency-analyzer.ts (1, '../../utils/logger'), analyzer/analyzer-service.ts (1, '../../utils/logger'), query/query-executor.ts (1, '../../utils/logger').
npx tsc --noEmit — exit 0.
npx vitest run — all tests pass.
Final acceptance check: grep -r 'console\.log\|console\.error\|console\.warn' src --include='*.ts' | grep -v '__tests__\|\.test\.ts\|src/cli/' | wc -l must equal 0.
git commit: 'refactor(logging): complete console→logger migration — 198 non-CLI calls eliminated'
Phase 4 complete. All 198 non-CLI console calls eliminated. Run /close-workorder WO-MIGRATE-CONSOLE-TO-LOGGER-001.
